import logging
from typing import Dict, Any

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class Cache:
    def __init__(self):
        self._data: Dict[str, Any] = {}

    def clear(self):
        self._data.clear()

    def set(self, key: str, value: Any):
        self._data[key] = value

    def bulk_set(self, items: Dict[str, Any]):
        self._data.update(items)


class ServiceRegistry:
    def __init__(self):
        self._services: Dict[str, Any] = {}

    def register(self, name: str, service: Any):
        self._services[name] = service

    def clear(self):
        self._services.clear()


def handle_reset_command(cache: Cache):
    cache.clear()
    logger.info("Cache cleared")


def handle_bulk_import(records, cache: Cache):
    items = {r["id"]: r for r in records}
    cache.bulk_set(items)
    logger.info(f"Imported {len(records)} records")
